channel.title: astroReport Daily Feed
channel.description: Daily arXiv astronomy reports for Zotero.

item.title: astroReport 日报 2026-04-02
item.description: 今日文献已更新。以下为自动生成的精简摘要。 Top papers: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.30029v1 https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29963v1 https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29947v1 https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29912v1 https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29899v1

item.title: astroReport 日报 2026-04-01
item.description: 今日没有匹配的新文献。
